field.role: tells you what exists (field / substrate / scalar manifold state)

shear.role: tells you how it deforms (shear / metric deformation / lawful geometry)

packet.role: tells you what is emitted/witnessed (packet / executable typed glyph-witness / codec event)

spectral.role: tells you what basis survives (spectral / eigenbasis / pruning-correlation structure)

axiom_1_shannon_entropy.mapping: Shannon entropy = field state (probability distribution over symbols)

axiom_2_kolmogorov_complexity.mapping: Kolmogorov complexity = spectral basis (shortest program = optimal basis)

axiom_3_zipf_law.formula: f(r) = C * r^(-α), where α ≈ 1.0-1.2 for English
axiom_3_zipf_law.mapping: Zipf law = field distribution (power-law distribution over symbols)

axiom_4_grammar_as_manifold.mapping: Grammar as manifold = field topology (low-dimensional embedding)

axiom_5_hyperbolic_hierarchy.mapping: Hyperbolic hierarchy = geometric deformation (distance metric in curved space)

axiom_6_information_bottleneck.mapping: Information bottleneck = spectral decomposition (compress irrelevant, preserve relevant)

axiom_7_ans_optimality.formula: L_ANS <= H(X) + ε, where ε ≈ 0.001 bits/symbol
axiom_7_ans_optimality.mapping: ANS optimality = packet coding (near-optimal entropy coding)

axiom_8_bwt_repetitiveness.formula: |RLBWT(w)| = O(r), where r = number of runs in BWT output
axiom_8_bwt_repetitiveness.mapping: BWT repetitiveness = packet transform (permuted sort clusters contexts)

axiom_9_mdl_principle.mapping: MDL principle = spectral tradeoff (model size + data description)

axiom_10_topological_invariants.formula: H_k(X_ε) for ε in [0, ∞), tracking birth/death of k-dimensional holes

grand_compression_equation.formula: C* = argmin_C [ H(X|C) + λ|C| + μ*K(C) + ν*dim(M_C) ]
grand_compression_equation.mapping: Grand compression equation = packet optimization (balance entropy, model size, complexity, dimensionality)

language_as_manifold.mapping: Language as manifold = shear transform (grammar → manifold embedding)

hyperbolic_semantic_distance.mapping: Hyperbolic semantic distance = spectral metric (distance in hyperbolic space)

information_bottleneck_language.mapping: Information bottleneck for language = spectral regularization (compression + prediction + geometry)

field_primitive.role: field state / substrate / scalar manifold state

packet_primitive.equation: Γᵢ = γᵢ ⊗ χᵢ ⊗ κᵢ ⊗ τᵢ ⊗ UᵢΛᵢaᵢ ⊗ θᵢ ⊗ εᵢ
packet_primitive.role: packet / executable typed glyph-witness / codec event

insights.consistency: Grand unified theory axioms map cleanly to 4 primitives
insights.completeness: Each primitive has representative equations from multiple sources
insights.integration: Compactified core equations subsume grand unified theory equations
